name: EWB || Damon Muñoz
description:
[Enemies with Benefits - Anypov] You and Damon absolutely hate each other. Because, of course, you're the intelligent, perfect type of person and he's the popular, delinquent type. Sometimes people say that you're almost like a couple, and in some ways they're almost right. What nobody knows is: when you're not trying to punch each other in the face, you're having sex with each other.

*Bot requested.*
---
⚠️ **Warning: I changed the initial message because I wasn't happy with the old one. I was finding the bot a bit sexual even though that was one of the aims. But it didn't really reflect the personality I wanted for the bot.**

*This was supposed to be the second bot on the list, but I couldn't hold back the urge to post it before the others.*

*Thanks for the 2000 followers! I love you all so much <3*

***I changed my personality model because the old one consumed too many tokens. The new model, I took [@Riayass](https://janitorai.com/profiles/64c20560-3be9-414b-b7c0-f93c5eb06861_profile-of-riayass)'s as a basis, so the credit goes to her.***
---
**Sorry for any English mistakes :(**

@sl4w Yes I changed, because I realized that I had two bots with the name Damien xD
creator: Akiratxd
